name: bedrock
description: Bedrock — the Zero One Stack Next.js/React engineering kit, one unified standard built on Feature-Sliced Design (FSD). Constitution + rules (feature-sliced-design, architecture, components, tokens, a11y, testing, security, i18n, performance, observability, CI) and enterprise governance (governance, ADRs, tech-radar, compliance); agents (frontend-architect, component-builder, frontend-reviewer, monorepo-architect, adr-author); scaffolding + governance skills; enforcement hooks + Steiger/dependency-cruiser FSD fitness functions; managed-settings; policy-as-code. Auto-discovered skills/agents/commands/hooks come from the plugin; run /bedrock:kit-init to copy the CLAUDE.md constitution + rules/ into the project (plugins can't auto-load those), then /bedrock:enterprise-init to wire the governance/CI/ADR pieces.
